meta.title: Contact | Jabugo Bodega
meta.description: Contact and location for Jabugo Bodega in Granada, with fast mobile actions for booking, calling, and maps.

sections.title: Where we are
paragraphs: Jabugo Bodega is located at Calle Socrates 13, 18002 Granada, in Barrio de Ronda.
On mobile, priority is to resolve location, booking, and call actions quickly.

quote.text: Local conversion improves when arriving and booking are solved in just a few taps.
quote.author: Nicolás

image.alt: Jabugo Bodega facade on Calle Socrates

sections.title: Synchronized information
paragraphs: The research highlights web and Google Business Profile data sync as a key factor.
It also recommends replying to reviews to strengthen local visibility in Google Maps.

quote.text: Proximity traffic is the most valuable for a bodega of this scale.
quote.author: Nicolás

image.alt: Access area in Barrio de Ronda
